---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in Fennec
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Fennec version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Channel | Release / Nightly |
| Architecture | x86_64 / arm64 |

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include the Request Journal output (`fennec://journal`) if the bug is network-related.
